subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-07-21
subcodes.first_line: How many great men have come into the world! What wealth they have owned! What kings have sat on the thrones
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه قدر بزرگان در دنیا آمدند چه قدر صاحبان ثروت بودند
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @eulogies; reminiscences, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @martyrs and martyrdom
